notes: Two-leg GBPUSD/USDCAD FX cointegration candidate from a full 66-pair rerun that includes negative hedge ratios. The published positive-hedge scan hard-certified only QM5_12533 and QM5_12532; this row is the top unbuilt full-scan candidate with DEV net Sharpe 0.26 and OOS net Sharpe 1.55.

The scan hedge is negative, so the EA trades the second leg with sign(-beta) direction: long spread means long GBPUSD and long USDCAD, short spread means short both legs. Q02 uses USD tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 budget.
